# html2md/scripts ‚Äî agent notes

`html2md` is the repo's first **TWO-master** skill (CLAUDE.md ¬ß2). Proprietary,
All Rights Reserved (embeds proprietary docx/pdf code ‚Äî see ../NOTICE).

## Cross-skill replication ‚Äî DO NOT EDIT replicas here (`diff -q` gated)

- `web_clean/{archives,reader_mode,preprocess,dom_utils,normalize_css}.py`
  ‚Äî MASTER = **pdf** (`skills/pdf/scripts/html2pdf_lib/`). The pdf
  `render.py` / `chrome_engine.py` / package `__init__.py` are the only
  weasyprint/playwright carriers and are **never** replicated.
- `html2md_core.js` ‚Äî MASTER = **docx** (`docx2md.js` turndown core; lands 022-03).
- `_errors.py`, `_venv_bootstrap.py` ‚Äî MASTER = **docx** (4‚Üí5-skill loop).

`web_clean/__init__.py` is **html2md-owned** (thin re-export of the clean public
symbols) and is NOT gated. A smoke-test (G-2) asserts `weasyprint`/`playwright`
stay out of `sys.modules` after importing `web_clean.archives` + `.reader_mode`.

## html2md-owned files

- `html2md.py` ‚Äî shim: venv bootstrap (`reexec_into_venv`) + re-exports.
- `html2md/cli.py` ‚Äî argparse surface (ARCH ¬ß5.1), path/URL resolution, exit-map,
  `_errors` envelope routing. `main`/`convert` wired in 022-05.
- `html2md/acquire.py` ‚Äî FC-1: input dispatch + fetch (offline 022-02, URL 022-06).
  Heavy deps (httpx/trafilatura/playwright) imported lazily INSIDE functions only.
- `html2md/clean.py` ‚Äî FC-2: calls `web_clean` (022-04). Never edits the replicas.
- `html2md_convert.js` ‚Äî **html2md-owned** (NOT gated) turndown wrapper over the
  docx-mastered `html2md_core.js`; adds ARIA-role-table‚ÜíGFM + chrome-button strip
  (web-page patterns docx doesn't have). The Node bridge spawns THIS file.
- `html2md/md_clean.py` ‚Äî **html2md-owned** post-turndown Markdown tidy: merge empty
  ATX headings (GitBook/Mintlify/Fern split headings), drop standalone chrome lines
  (Copy / Search‚Ä¶ / Ask AI / feedback / AI-widget), collapse blank runs.
- `html2md/core_bridge.py` ‚Äî FC-3: spawns `node html2md_convert.js` (which require()s
  the gated `html2md_core.js`).
- `html2md/emit.py` ‚Äî FC-4: frontmatter + `_attachments/` + dual-output (022-05).
- `html2md/model.py` ‚Äî the inter-stage IR (`AcquireResult`, `CleanResult`).
- `html2md/exceptions.py` ‚Äî `_AppError` hierarchy + exit codes.
